# FilaScope — llms.txt

# The world's most complete 3D printer filament comparison platform

> FilaScope indexes 1,076+ 3D printer filaments from 49+ brands with detailed specs, real-time pricing from 15+ regional stores, HueForge Transmission Distance (TD) values, and printer compatibility data.

## Core Pages

- Homepage: https://filascope.com/
- Filament Database: https://filascope.com/filaments
- 3D Printer Database: https://filascope.com/printers
- Brand Directory: https://filascope.com/brands
- HueForge TD Database: https://filascope.com/hueforge-td-database
- Filament Deals: https://filascope.com/deals
- Comparison Tool: https://filascope.com/compare
- Color Finder: https://filascope.com/color-finder
- Learning Center: https://filascope.com/learn

## Material Categories

- PLA Filaments: https://filascope.com/filaments/pla
- PETG Filaments: https://filascope.com/filaments/petg
- ABS Filaments: https://filascope.com/filaments/abs
- TPU Filaments: https://filascope.com/filaments/tpu
- ASA Filaments: https://filascope.com/filaments/asa
- Nylon Filaments: https://filascope.com/filaments/nylon

## Key Features

- HueForge TD (Transmission Distance) values for lithophane printing
- Real-time pricing from US, CA, EU, UK, AU stores with currency normalization
- Printer compatibility filtering (select your printer, see only compatible filaments)
- Side-by-side filament comparison tool
- FilaScore quality ratings
